title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Southern District Council (refuse) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Southern District Council (refuse) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the Southern District Council (Refuse) Bye-Laws.

provisions.title: Application
provisions.content:
2. Application
These Bye-laws shall apply to all areas within the jurisdiction of the Southern District Council.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: the Council Secretary or any other officer of the Council authorised in writing by the Council Secretary to perform duties under these Bye-laws
a waste management facility identified by the Council as a place where waste shall be deposited for disposal
any yard, field, garden or land, whether enclosed or open

any waste, filth, rubbish, trash, rubble, garbage, excrement, waste product from any source, derelict vehicles or tyres, and any matter which may be offensive, or a nuisance or injurious or dangerous to health or favours the breeding of flies or mosquitoes or harbouring of rodents or substances and any combination thereof which are discarded or accumulated by any person
